title: verify-full input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-full`. Covers SPEC §11 end-to-end orchestration: Sigstore-attested measurement (the public source of truth) is cross-checked against a freshly-fetched hardware attestation (the per-enclave proof) so that the SDK accepts only when both agree.

mode.description: SPEC §11 flow mode. 'standard' (§11.1): fetch attestation + verify sigstore + cross-compare. 'bundle' (§11.2): all materials pre-assembled in one envelope. 'pinned' (§11.3): skip sigstore + hw lookup; require attestation to match a caller-pinned measurement.

sigstore.description: Sigstore stage inputs — mirrors verify-sigstore.input.schema.json. Required for mode='standard' and 'bundle'.

attestation_sev.description: SEV-SNP attestation inputs — mirrors verify-attestation-sev.input.schema.json. Required when the enclave platform is SEV-SNP.

attestation_tdx.description: TDX attestation inputs — mirrors verify-attestation-tdx.input.schema.json. Required when the enclave platform is TDX.

hardware_measurements.description: Hardware measurement list (SPEC §6 / §11.1 step 4). Only consulted when the sigstore-extracted MultiPlatform measurement reduces against a TDX attestation.

pinned_measurement.description: Used only when mode='pinned'. The caller-supplied measurement that the hardware attestation MUST match (SPEC §11.3 — skips sigstore + hw lookup; suitable for re-verification or out-of-band pinning).
